title: padus mahaleb f. variegata
intro: Padus mahaleb f. variegata, also known as the Variegated May or Dwarf May, is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Padus mahaleb f. variegata include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as reducing fever and soothing irritated skin. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
